source.measurement: context_cost_report.py over six configured AGENTS.md files

method.token_estimator: characters divided by four, approximately plus or minus 10 percent versus cl100k
method.precision_check: extract configured precision facts from each source and require every detected fact in the distilled corpus

integrity.algorithm: sha256 of canonical JSON receipt excluding integrity

limitations: The source documents are private company operating files and are not published.
This receipt makes the historical aggregate verifiable; it does not rerun the calculation or let a third party inspect the private source text.
The result is one client-zero measurement, not a customer average or performance guarantee.
The token count is an estimator, not provider billing telemetry.
